name: The Story Of
short_description: A collection of 3 relaxing simulators, never before released on PC. Grow the worlds, find all the endings.
detailed_description:
The Story Of... is a collection of 3 atmospheric simulators, available for the first time on desktop, in one convenient package. Watch the worlds grow, find the endings, partake in the serene nature of the stories told.

The Story of a World

The story of a World is an interactive piece of art. You are presented with an empty world where you choose what happens to it.

Depending on what you choose to add to the world, be it mountains, water, lifeforms, or other, the world might evolve into something new. Explore the different ways to build the world in order to find the 18 goals.

The Story of a Star

The Story of a Star lets you partake in the life and death of a solitary star. What will happen within this small part of the infinity that is space. Will there be life? Will there be peace? Or war?

Unlock the different stories being told, and watch the star reach its ultimate fate.

The Story of a Sea

The Story of a Sea is an experience. Partake in the life of this piece of the world, decide the direction it will take, and uncover the secrets. Enjoy a meditative puzzle, and try to relax.

The Story of a Sea continues the format set by its predecessors, The Story of a World and The Story of a Star, with the same of meditative experience. The object of the game is to find the 20 different endings. Watch the sea, life, sky, moon, and land evolve!
